## Consistency Checklist (Required)

- [ ] I updated SSOT files before reference files.
- [ ] I used `DEC-* / DB-* / API-* / GATE-*` references instead of duplicating full specs.
- [ ] I did not add full DDL/API schema to non-SSOT docs.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_docs_consistency.py` locally and it passed.
- [ ] If acceptance docs were modified, each file includes `## 0. 规范引用 IDs`.
